Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes current product listings, promotions, and brake part details to use as source material for email content.
Email Marketing Agent.impact: Ensures every email reflects live inventory and real offers, keeping messaging accurate and conversion-ready without manual content gathering.

Email Marketing Agent.action: Generates a branded daily marketing email using R1 Concepts product data, including subject line, body copy, and call-to-action.
Email Marketing Agent.impact: Produces professional, on-brand email copy every day at scale, eliminating hours of manual copywriting and maintaining consistent campaign cadence.

Email Marketing Agent.action: Receives the AI-generated email content via API and sends it to the configured R1 Concepts contact lists as a marketing email.
Email Marketing Agent.impact: Delivers daily campaigns to segmented audiences automatically, driving consistent traffic and revenue without manual send coordination.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes current DFC product lines, friction materials, and promotional details to inform email content generation.
DFC Email Marketing Agent.impact: Grounds AI-generated emails in real product data specific to DFC, ensuring relevance and accuracy for their B2B and B2C audiences.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Generates a daily DFC-branded marketing email with subject line, body copy, and product-focused messaging tailored to their audience.
DFC Email Marketing Agent.impact: Sustains a daily email marketing cadence for DFC without manual effort, keeping their brand top-of-mind with customers and prospects.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Publishes and sends the AI-drafted DFC email to the appropriate HubSpot contact lists via the Marketing Email API.
DFC Email Marketing Agent.impact: Automates daily outreach for DFC, ensuring no sending day is missed and freeing the marketing team from repetitive send tasks.

R1 Support Agent.action: Pulls new and open support tickets from HubSpot, including customer messages, order details, and ticket metadata.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Gives the AI full context on each support case instantly, enabling accurate classification and relevant replies without agents manually reviewing each ticket.

R1 Support Agent.action: References DFC product documentation and part compatibility information to enrich support responses with accurate technical details.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Improves reply accuracy for brake and friction product inquiries, reducing back-and-forth and increasing first-contact resolution rates.

R1 Support Agent.action: Classifies each ticket by issue type and drafts a professional, context-aware reply ready for the support team to review and send.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Cuts ticket response drafting time dramatically, allowing the support team to handle higher volume with consistent quality and faster resolution.

Customer Issues Analyzer.action: Pulls form submissions from Amazon in-box flyer return and issue forms stored as HubSpot contacts or form entries.
Customer Issues Analyzer.impact: Centralizes all customer-reported product issues from Amazon purchases into one structured pull, replacing manual inbox monitoring and data hunting.

Customer Issues Analyzer.action: Syncs the retrieved HubSpot form submissions into a structured Google Sheet for team review, tracking, and trend analysis.
Customer Issues Analyzer.impact: Gives operations and product teams a live, organized view of customer issues, enabling faster identification of recurring defects or fulfillment problems.

DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.action: Monitors HubSpot contact and activity records to detect when DFC customers visit or engage with the R1 Concepts website.
DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.impact: Surfaces high-intent buying signals in real time, giving the sales team the ability to reach out to warm accounts at the exact right moment.

DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.action: Sends an automated real-time alert to the DFC sales team via Teams message and email with the customer activity details.
DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.impact: Eliminates the lag between a customer showing interest and a sales rep knowing about it, increasing the likelihood of timely, successful outreach.

R1 Customer Agent.action: Planned customer-facing AI agent for R1 Concepts — specific functionality and integrations are still being defined.
R1 Customer Agent.impact: Expected to improve customer self-service and response speed once deployed, reducing inbound support load for the R1 team.

Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.action: Scrapes local business directories, listings, and public web sources to identify businesses in the Cerritos area likely to need warehouse or office space.
Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.impact: Generates a fresh pool of warm, relevant leads daily without any manual prospecting, keeping the sublet pipeline consistently active.

Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.action: Finds and validates email addresses for decision-makers at identified businesses using email discovery tools.
Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.impact: Ensures outreach reaches real contacts rather than generic inboxes, improving reply rates and reducing bounce risk.

Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.action: Logs discovered leads as HubSpot contacts and sends personalized warm intro emails pitching the 13140 Midway Place Cerritos sublet opportunity.
Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.impact: Automates the full outreach loop daily — from lead to email — filling the sublet faster and saving significant business development time.

R1 DFC Amazon Ads AI.action: Pulls campaign performance data across R1 and DFC Amazon ad accounts including spend, impressions, clicks, and conversion metrics.
R1 DFC Amazon Ads AI.impact: Consolidates cross-brand ad performance into one structured dataset, enabling unified analysis that would otherwise require manual exports from multiple accounts.

R1 DFC Amazon Ads AI.action: Analyzes campaign performance data to identify underperforming ads, budget inefficiencies, and optimization opportunities across both brands.
R1 DFC Amazon Ads AI.impact: Delivers actionable optimization recommendations at a speed and depth no human analyst could match daily, improving ad efficiency and reducing wasted spend.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Searches YouTube for content creators matching input keywords, retrieving channel data, subscriber counts, and relevant video content.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Surfaces a broad pool of relevant creators instantly across the largest video platform, replacing hours of manual creator searching.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Pulls matching creator profiles and post data from Instagram based on the same discovery keywords.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Expands creator discovery across a second high-value platform simultaneously, giving a more complete picture of available influencer talent.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Analyzes and synthesizes creator data from all sources to identify the most relevant and brand-aligned creators from the full discovery pool.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Reduces a large, unfiltered creator list down to a qualified shortlist, saving significant manual review time and improving partnership targeting.

Creator Qualifier.action: Scores each discovered creator against customizable weighting criteria such as engagement rate, niche fit, audience size, and content quality.
Creator Qualifier.impact: Produces an objective, weighted ranking of creators that helps teams prioritize outreach with confidence, removing guesswork from influencer selection.

Creator Outreach.action: Retrieves pre-built outreach sequences, prompt templates, and qualified creator lists stored in Drive folders.
Creator Outreach.impact: Ensures every outreach campaign uses the latest approved messaging and targeting criteria without manual file hunting.

Creator Outreach.action: Generates personalized outreach emails for each creator by applying learned sequences and prompts to their profile data.
Creator Outreach.impact: Produces tailored, on-brand messages at scale, replacing hours of manual copywriting per creator contact.

Creator Outreach.action: Sends the AI-generated outreach emails directly to each qualified creator from the brand inbox.
Creator Outreach.impact: Delivers professional outreach to dozens of creators simultaneously, accelerating partnership pipeline without manual sending.

Creator Reponse.action: Pulls historical influencer email conversations and negotiation outcomes stored in Drive to inform response strategy.
Creator Reponse.impact: Grounds AI responses in real past negotiations, improving deal consistency and avoiding previously failed approaches.

Creator Reponse.action: Analyzes the incoming creator reply and generates a contextual negotiation response using learned conversation patterns from prior deals.
Creator Reponse.impact: Maintains natural, informed dialogue with creators at scale, reducing back-and-forth cycle time and improving close rates.

Creator Reponse.action: Sends the AI-crafted negotiation reply to the creator within the existing email thread.
Creator Reponse.impact: Keeps conversations moving without requiring a human to draft each response, compressing deal timelines significantly.

Must Have Monday Email Automation.action: Matches MHM vehicle part numbers from the vehicle data sheet against the New Availability Guide to identify eligible load sheet items.
Must Have Monday Email Automation.impact: Eliminates manual cross-referencing of vehicle inventory data, reducing load sheet prep from hours to seconds.

Must Have Monday Email Automation.impact: Delivers a fully formatted, data-accurate MHM email every week without manual email building or attachment handling.

Must Have Monday Email Automation.action: Posts a completion notification to the relevant Teams channel confirming the MHM email has been sent.
Must Have Monday Email Automation.impact: Keeps the marketing and sales team instantly informed of email deployment without checking HubSpot manually.

First to Market Email Automation.action: Generates email copy for new product launch announcements and monthly recap emails using product data and brand voice guidelines.
First to Market Email Automation.impact: Produces launch-ready email content in seconds, freeing the marketing team from drafting repetitive product announcement copy.

First to Market Email Automation.action: Creates email drafts in HubSpot for First to Market campaigns, attaching the AI-generated copy and associated sales sheets for review or send.
First to Market Email Automation.impact: Centralizes all launch email drafts in HubSpot with zero manual entry, ensuring campaigns are ready to deploy as soon as products are available.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Pulls lifecycle stage metrics and contact reporting data needed for the marketing highlights deck slides.
Marketing Deck Automation.impact: Replaces manual HubSpot report exports, ensuring slide data is always current and accurate at generation time.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Retrieves SMS campaign performance metrics including send volume, click rates, and revenue attribution for the reporting period.
Marketing Deck Automation.impact: Consolidates SMS data automatically into the deck workflow, eliminating a separate manual export step each month.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Fetches web traffic, session, conversion, and channel performance data for the monthly reporting window.
Marketing Deck Automation.impact: Delivers accurate site analytics directly into the deck without manual GA4 report building or copy-paste errors.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Writes all collected metrics from HubSpot, Attentive, GA4, and Search Console into slides 48–55 of the Marketing Highlights deck.
Marketing Deck Automation.impact: Automates the most time-intensive section of the monthly deck, saving several hours of manual data entry and formatting per reporting cycle.

R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.action: Identifies keyword gaps where R1 Concepts underperforms versus competitors by analyzing impression and ranking data.
R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.impact: Focuses content production on the highest-opportunity search terms, maximizing organic traffic gains per blog published.

R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.action: Writes full SEO-optimized blog articles targeting the identified keyword gaps, structured for Yoast SEO best practices.
R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.impact: Produces publish-ready, search-optimized content at scale without requiring a dedicated content writer for each article.

R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.action: Publishes the generated blog post to the R1 Concepts WordPress site with Yoast SEO fields populated from the AI output.
R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.impact: Eliminates manual CMS entry and Yoast configuration, compressing the time from keyword gap discovery to live indexed content.

Shirly PO Workflow Automation.action: Exports open purchase order data including vendor details, PO numbers, due dates, and outstanding item quantities.
Shirly PO Workflow Automation.impact: Captures the full vendor follow-up workload automatically, replacing manual ERP report generation and data cleanup.

DFC Load Sheet Generator.action: Accepts MHM vehicle part number inputs and matches them against the embedded New Availability Guide data within the browser.
DFC Load Sheet Generator.impact: Enables any team member to generate accurate load sheets instantly without needing ERP access or technical support.

DFC Load Sheet Generator.action: Exports the matched results as a formatted DFC load sheet Excel file ready for use in ordering or email campaigns.

MHM Attentive SMS Automation.action: Opens Attentive in Chrome, locates the most recent MHM SMS campaign, and clones it to create a new campaign draft.

DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.action: Exports DFC sales transaction data including customer purchase history, order frequency, product mix, and revenue by account.
DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.impact: Provides the raw sales intelligence needed to power segmentation and outreach without manual data pulls from Dream.

DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.action: Segments customers into reorder, cross-sell, and win-back audiences based on the analyzed sales data, then enrolls them in targeted email sequences.

DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.action: Launches complementary SMS campaigns to high-priority customer segments identified in the sales analysis for reorder reminders and promotions.

Super Session Saturday Automation.action: Monitors a designated Teams channel for a new Excel file uploaded by William Nguyen each week.
Super Session Saturday Automation.impact: Eliminates manual file checking and ensures the workflow triggers automatically the moment new session data is available, saving staff time every week.

Super Session Saturday Automation.action: Uploads the new Excel file to HubSpot File Manager and generates a public download URL to replace the previous week's link.
Super Session Saturday Automation.impact: Ensures subscribers always receive a valid, current download link without anyone manually uploading files or editing URLs in the email.

Super Session Saturday Automation.action: Clones the previous week's Super Session Saturday email, swaps in the new download URL, and schedules the email to send Saturday at 8AM.

DFC SEO Blog System.action: Generates SEO-optimized B2B blog content targeting DFC's core audiences including shops, distributors, and fleets based on keyword and topic inputs.
DFC SEO Blog System.impact: Produces consistent, high-quality SEO content at scale without requiring a full-time writer, compressing blog production from days to minutes.

DFC SEO Blog System.action: Receives the generated blog content and publishes it as a formatted post with proper SEO metadata, categories, and tags applied.
DFC SEO Blog System.impact: Keeps DFC's blog consistently updated with search-optimized content that drives organic traffic from shop owners, fleet managers, and distributors.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Puppeteer scrapes YouTube for existing Friction Friday-style videos, Bing Images for vehicle visuals, and Wikipedia/Wikimedia for factual vehicle history and specs.
Friction Friday Automation.impact: Eliminates hours of manual research by instantly gathering reference content, imagery, and verified facts needed to build an accurate, on-brand script.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Claude receives all scraped research and generates a fully structured Friction Friday video script — including intro, segment breakdown, and outro — matched to the show's tone and format.
Friction Friday Automation.impact: Produces a broadcast-ready script in seconds that would otherwise take a writer 2–4 hours to research and draft from scratch.

Friction Friday Automation.action: The generated script is sent to ElevenLabs, which converts it into a natural-sounding voiceover audio file using a consistent branded voice.
Friction Friday Automation.impact: Delivers studio-quality narration instantly, removing the need to schedule, record, or edit a human voiceover session.

Friction Friday Automation.action: An Apps Script webhook assembles and logs the final video package — script, voiceover file link, thumbnail image, and video metadata — into a structured Sheets record for review or publishing.
Friction Friday Automation.impact: Delivers a complete, organized production package in one place, giving the team a ready-to-publish asset with zero manual file hunting or formatting.

R1 HubSpot Workflow Optimization.action: Pulls all existing R1 Concepts HubSpot workflows and audits enrollment triggers, logic branches, and action sequences for site visit and welcome series flows.
R1 HubSpot Workflow Optimization.impact: Surfaces broken logic, redundant steps, and missed enrollment conditions so the team can fix revenue-impacting gaps in the customer journey without manual workflow review.

R1 HubSpot Workflow Optimization.action: Applies optimized trigger conditions, corrected enrollment logic, and updated action sequences to the audited workflows and activates them.
R1 HubSpot Workflow Optimization.impact: Ensures R1 Concepts contacts receive the right automated follow-up at the right time, improving lead conversion and reducing revenue lost to poor workflow logic.

DFC HubSpot Data Setup.action: Extracts Dream CustomerIDs along with associated contact details such as name, email, and account data from the Dream ERP system.
DFC HubSpot Data Setup.impact: Creates a clean, structured data source that enables accurate matching between DFC's ERP customer records and HubSpot contacts for automation.

Bomb File Project.action: Project is currently in planning stage with connections and workflow steps not yet defined.

DFC Blog Agent Reporting.action: Pulls weekly keyword rankings, impressions, clicks, and average position data for DFC blog posts.
DFC Blog Agent Reporting.impact: Provides real search performance data so the team can see exactly which blog topics are gaining traction and which need optimization.

DFC Blog Agent Reporting.action: Retrieves traffic, session, engagement, and conversion data for DFC blog pages over the reporting period.

DFC Blog Agent Reporting.action: Pulls post publish dates, word counts, Yoast SEO scores, and content output volume for the reporting period.

R1 Blog Agent Reporting.action: Pulls monthly keyword ranking changes, impressions, and click data for all R1 Concepts blog posts.

R1 Blog Agent Reporting.action: Retrieves monthly organic traffic, session quality, and conversion metrics for R1 blog content.

R1 Blog Agent Reporting.action: Extracts monthly content output data including number of posts published, SEO scores, and category distribution.

PO Invoice Stamp & Sign Automation.action: Monitors the Outlook inbox for incoming vendor PO invoice PDF attachments and extracts them for processing.

DFC Site Visit Automated Emails.action: Tracks which DFC prospect pages are visited and passes behavioral signals to HubSpot to trigger the correct workflow.

R1 AI Ticketing Automation.action: Receives incoming customer support tickets and extracts key details such as issue type, order number, and customer history.

R1 AI Ticketing Automation.action: Routes the classified ticket to the correct queue or agent, or auto-sends the AI-generated response for straightforward cases.

DFC New Arrival Guide (NAG).action: Receives the new parts file from Gerrit Young and triggers the automation pipeline to begin processing and distribution.

Weekly Checkup Bot.action: Pulls current week performance data across all three paid channels including spend, impressions, clicks, and conversions.

Amazon Flyer -> Meta Audience Sync.action: Detects when a contact completes the Amazon flyer warranty registration and tags them as a qualified customer in the CRM.

Asana Agent.action: Monitors Asana for task updates, new assignments, overdue items, and project status changes across active boards.

Asana Agent.action: Delivers the Asana status briefing to relevant team members or stakeholders on a scheduled or triggered basis.

Media Meeting Task Agent.action: Captures the transcript or notes from the weekly media meeting as the source input for task extraction.

Google Ads Copy Audit.action: Pulls performance data and ad copy from all active search campaigns, isolating ads that fall below defined performance thresholds such as low CTR or conversion rate.

Agent Tracker Agent.action: Reads the current state of the Agent Tracker sheet, pulling all agent entries, statuses, owners, and progress notes for the week.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Claude structures and formats the raw inventory data into a clean, organized catalog layout — clearly separating what DFC stocks from what is missing.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Transforms a raw data dump into a professional, easy-to-read output that Mark can immediately use for customer or sales conversations.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Emails Mark the completed catalog as a formatted Excel file attachment, ready for immediate use.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Delivers the finished catalog directly to Mark within minutes of his request, eliminating the wait time of a manual build.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Queries Dream to pull live inventory status for every part on the weekly backorder report — capturing on-hand quantity, on-order status, and in-transit details.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Replaces a process where a dozen people run independent lookups by centralizing all inventory intelligence into one automated pull.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Enriches each line of the backorder report with the live Dream data, flags parts with no inventory source as dead ends, and structures the output for review.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Turns a static backorder list into a dynamic, actionable report — instantly showing which orders can be fulfilled and which need escalation.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Generates and sends draft customer communications for affected orders, pre-populated with the relevant status details for each part or shipment.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Saves significant time across the team by auto-drafting customer updates that previously required individual manual composition for each backorder.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Scrapes Gyro Disc, Alcon, and Brembo's online catalogs to extract make, model, and year fitment data for all available two-piece rotor products.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Builds a comprehensive competitive fitment reference in a fraction of the time it would take to manually review three separate manufacturer catalogs.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Cross-references the scraped fitment data against DFC's existing parts inventory to identify which vehicles are already covered and where gaps or opportunities exist.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Gives Dino a clear, data-backed map of where DFC competes and where new product opportunities exist in the two-piece rotor market.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Sends automated outreach emails to target customers to gather demand data — asking which vehicles and rotor specs are most relevant to their purchasing needs.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Collects real demand signals from the market at scale without requiring manual outreach from the sales or product team.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Compiles all scraped catalog data, cross-reference results, and customer demand responses into a single formatted output sheet delivered to Dino.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Delivers a fully organized, decision-ready reference document that consolidates what would otherwise require weeks of manual research and outreach.

Meta Investigation.action: Pulls all active Meta and TikTok ad copy — including headlines, primary text, and descriptions — across every running campaign and ad set.
Meta Investigation.impact: Captures the full universe of live ad copy instantly, making it possible to scan thousands of ads in seconds rather than reviewing them manually one by one.

Meta Investigation.action: Scans all collected ad copy for specific flagged phrases or patterns, identifying the exact ad, field, and copy string where each match appears.
Meta Investigation.impact: Delivers precise, auditable phrase detection across the entire active ad library in moments — a task that would take a compliance or marketing reviewer hours to complete manually.

Meta Investigation.action: Emails a formatted report listing every flagged ad with the exact field name and copy excerpt where each phrase match was found.
Meta Investigation.impact: Puts a clean, actionable flagged-copy report directly in the right person's inbox on demand, enabling fast review and remediation with no manual digging required.

Paid Channel Chat bot.action: Connects to active Meta and TikTok ad accounts to pull real-time campaign performance data, ad copy, spend, and audience metrics on demand.
Paid Channel Chat bot.impact: Gives users instant access to cross-platform paid media data without logging into multiple ad platforms or pulling manual reports.

Paid Channel Chat bot.action: Interprets natural language questions about paid channel performance and responds with accurate, data-driven answers pulled from the connected ad account data.
Paid Channel Chat bot.impact: Enables anyone on the team to query paid media performance conversationally — removing the need for a specialist to pull and interpret reports for every question.

Resume Bot.action: Monitors the jobs@r1concepts.com inbox for incoming applications, extracts the resume attachment and candidate details from each email.
Resume Bot.impact: Eliminates manual inbox monitoring and ensures every application is captured and processed consistently — even during high-volume hiring periods.

Resume Bot.action: Saves each extracted resume PDF to an organized Drive folder, structured by role or candidate status for easy retrieval.
Resume Bot.impact: Creates a clean, searchable resume archive automatically — replacing scattered email attachments with a structured filing system.

Resume Bot.action: Reads each resume and scores the candidate against the requirements of open roles, classifying them as approved, denied, or pending based on role availability and fit.
Resume Bot.impact: Cuts screening time dramatically by delivering an objective, consistent first-pass evaluation for every applicant — freeing recruiters to focus only on qualified candidates.

Resume Bot.action: Logs every candidate decision — approved, denied, or pending — to a Sheets dashboard, with denied and no-resume candidates auto-replied via Gmail and paused-role candidates held in a Pending tab.
Resume Bot.impact: Gives the hiring team a live, centralized view of every applicant's status while ensuring no candidate goes without a timely response — protecting the employer brand at scale.

summary: The pipeline stands strong at 56 total agents — 29 completed, 10 in progress, and 17 planned. No new agents were added to the pipeline this week. On the progress front, the Paid Channel Chatbot moved to Completed, giving the team another fully operational tool in the arsenal. Great momentum continuing across the board as we push more agents toward the finish line!
